summary: Tested Pre-Assessment Workflow (Phase 8) - Complete workflow from Partner creates lead → Sends ₹5,100 payment link → Client pays → Partner submits docs to Admin → Admin approves/rejects → Partner sends sales proposal. All 32 backend tests PASSED. Frontend UI for both Partner and Admin dashboards working correctly.

pre_assessment_create.details: Partner creates new pre-assessment with client_name, client_email, country, service_type (required), plus optional fields

send_payment_link.details: Sends ₹5,100 Stripe payment link (mock mode active), changes stage to payment_pending

confirm_payment.details: Confirms payment received, changes stage to payment_received

mock_payment.details: Mock payment endpoint for testing without Stripe

upload_document.details: Multipart upload with document_type and file

submit_documents.details: Submits to admin for review, changes stage to under_review

admin_queue.details: Admin gets pending reviews (under_review, documents_submitted stages)

admin_review.details: Admin approves/rejects with decision, reason, notes. Rejection triggers refund_initiated stage

send_proposal.details: Partner sends proposal after approval with fee_amount, currency. Auto-creates sale record

get_single_pa.details: Get single PA details with documents

stats_overview.details: Stats: total, new, under_review, approved, rejected, proposal_sent, conversion_rate

get_documents.details: Get all documents for a pre-assessment

details: Pre-Assessment tab visible in Partner sidebar
Stats cards: Total, Under Review, Approved, Proposals Sent, Conversion
New Pre-Assessment button works
Create form with all fields (Client Name, Email, Mobile, Country, Service Type, Product, Age, Education, Work Experience, Notes)
PA cards with stage badges (New Lead, Under Review, Payment Received, Refund Initiated, Proposal Sent)
Expanded card shows client details, payment status, documents count
Action buttons: Send Payment Link (₹5,100), Confirm Payment, Submit to Admin, Send Proposal
Stage progress indicator (7 steps)
Search and filter functionality
Pre-Assessments tab visible in Admin sidebar
Stats cards: Total, Pending Review, Approved, Rejected, Conversion
View toggle: Pending Review / All Pre-Assessments
Queue items with client details, partner name, stage badges
Expanded card shows Email, Mobile, Education, Experience, Age, Country, Pre-Assessment Fee, Documents
Approve and Reject buttons for items under review
Review form with reason and notes fields
Partner dashboard: Quick Actions, Stats (36 Total Sales, 21 Approved, ₹95,038 Commission), Recent Sales
Partner New Sale button and dialog working
Admin dashboard: Quick Actions, Happiness Score, Stats (13 Pending Sales, 20 Active Cases, ₹1,777,100 Revenue, 18 Open Tickets)
Admin Document Expiry Tracker working
All sidebar navigation items accessible

workflow_stages_verified: payment_pending → Payment link sent to client
approved → Admin approved, Partner can send proposal
proposal_sent → Partner sent sales proposal, sale auto-created
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test pre-assessments during backend testing (prefixed with TEST_PA_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pre-Assessment Workflow (Phase 8) fully functional. All 32 backend tests pass. Frontend components PreAssessmentPipeline.jsx (Partner) and PreAssessmentQueue.jsx (Admin) working correctly. Stages flow: new → payment_pending → payment_received → documents_submitted → under_review → approved/rejected → proposal_sent → case_created. Email service is MOCKED. Stripe uses test key (sk_test_emergent) with mock payment endpoint available.

mocked_apis.stripe: Stripe test key (sk_test_emergent) - mock payment endpoint available at POST /api/pre-assessment/{id}/mock-payment
